color_profiles.name: Classic Smoky Quartz
color_profiles.cause: Al-hole color centers from moderate irradiation dose.

color_profiles.name: Cairngorm
color_profiles.cause: Al-hole color centers with slight Fe contribution; lower irradiation dose.

color_profiles.name: Morion
color_profiles.cause: Very high irradiation dose; very dense color center population.

visual_notes: Smoky quartz produces the most varied depth range of any colored quartz — from barely-there smoke-gray to absolute black. Large faceted smoky quartz gems (hundreds to thousands of carats) are obtainable and affordable. The phantoms (ghost crystal growth zones) visible inside larger crystals add visual complexity.
